---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## 🎯 Motivation

Why would this feature be useful? What problem does it solve?

## 💡 Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution. Include any technical details if applicable.

## 📋 Use Cases

Describe specific use cases for this feature:

1. **Use case 1**: ...
2. **Use case 2**: ...
3. **Use case 3**: ...

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📊 Impact

How many users would benefit from this feature?
- [ ] Small number of users
- [ ] Many users
- [ ] All users

## 🔗 Related Issues

If this is related to any existing issues, link them here.

## 📝 Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or mockups about the feature request.
